name: Quaterra Resources Inc.
description: Quaterra Resources Inc., now known as Lion Copper and Gold Corp., is a mineral exploration and development company primarily focused on the acquisition, evaluation, and advancement of base and precious metal projects. The company is notably advancing its flagship copper assets located in Yerington, Nevada, through a strategic option to earn-in agreement with Nuton LLC, a venture of Rio Tinto. Originally incorporated in 1993, the company transitioned its corporate identity in November 2021 to better reflect its focus on copper and gold development within the North American mining sector.
